title: Linarium
body:
# ![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yVvj8Rpf/images/d6885b96823b957deaf12796284803b120024832.png)

## 📘 English

This pack includes a set of client-side optimization and cosmetic mods aimed at improving performance, visuals, and user experience without altering the vanilla gameplay.

<details>
<summary>Click to show the mod list</summary>

- [Anvian's Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/PuTjrq4T) by anvian
